zh.title: 贝尔为何要从足球传奇转身投资者
zh.summary: 威尔士传奇加雷斯·贝尔解释了他向体育投资领域的转变，以及他成为俱乐部老板的雄心。

title: What France & Iraq did during 'mentally draining' two-hour weather delay
summary: France and Iraq's World Cup match was disrupted by a two-hour weather delay, with both teams managing the mental and tactical challenges of the extended break.
content: France's World Cup match against Iraq was delayed for two hours because of the weather. BBC Sport look at how the sides dealt with it.

zh.title: 法国和伊拉克如何度过'令人精神疲惫'的两小时天气延误
zh.summary: 法国和伊拉克的世界杯比赛因两小时天气延误而中断，两支球队都需要应对这次延长休息所带来的精神和战术挑战。

title: Norway win five-goal thriller against Senegal to make last 32
summary: Erling Haaland scored twice as Norway defeated Senegal 3-2 in an exciting five-goal match to secure a spot in the World Cup's last 32.
content: Erling Haaland scores twice as Norway book their place in the last 32 of the World Cup with a 3-2 victory over Senegal in New Jersey.

zh.title: 挪威5:2战胜塞内加尔晋级32强
zh.summary: 埃尔林·哈兰德打进两球，帮助挪威3:2击败塞内加尔，在激烈的五球大战中赢得世界杯32强的席位。

title: 'Scoring machine' Haaland hits second double of World Cup
summary: Erling Haaland scored his second brace of the World Cup as Norway defeated Senegal 3-2 to advance to the knockout stage.
content: Erling Haaland scored another World Cup double as Norway beat Senegal 3-2 in New Jersey.

zh.title: "得分机器"哈兰德打入世界杯第二个两球
zh.summary: 埃尔林·哈兰德在世界杯中打入第二个两球，帮助挪威3:2战胜塞内加尔，晋级淘汰赛。

title: France weather storm to beat Iraq and sail into knockouts
summary: Kylian Mbappé marked his 100th international appearance with two goals as France dominated Iraq 3-0 despite a two-hour weather delay, securing their place in the knockout stage.
content: Kylian Mbappe marks his 100th international cap for France with two goals in a 3-0 win over Iraq which seals' Les Bleus place in the last 32, after a two-hour storm delay.

zh.title: 法国克服风暴击败伊拉克顺利晋级淘汰赛
zh.summary: 基利安·姆巴佩在第100次国家队出场中打入两球，尽管遭遇两小时天气延误，法国3:0大胜伊拉克，确保晋级淘汰赛。

title: England boss Tuchel not a fan of hydration breaks
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel expressed his disapproval of the World Cup's hydration breaks, which remain a controversial feature of the tournament.
content: England head coach Thomas Tuchel admits he is not a fan of the controversial hydration breaks being used at the World Cup.

zh.title: 英格兰主帅图赫尔反对补液暂停
zh.summary: 英格兰主帅托马斯·图赫尔表达了他对世界杯补液暂停的不赞成，这项措施仍然是这项赛事的一个有争议的特色。
